confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Selecting a city could trigger a second geocoding request
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Added `shouldRequestGeocoding()` and guarded the debounced effect when the query matches the selected location.

confirmedFindingsFixed.title: Suggestion list used incomplete combobox/listbox ARIA semantics
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Simplified suggestions to a plain list of buttons with accessible labels, avoiding invalid nested option controls.

residualRisks: Manual browser smoke is still required before archive to prove live Open-Meteo suggestions and URL sync in the rendered app.
Forecast and map remain deferred to later slices.
